claim_boundary: pre-real design, implementation, controls, and custody only; no MM-009 real outcome
findings_closed: PARENT-SHAPE-001 closed: the live MM-007 root has exactly eight pinned regular files plus one real non-symlink inputs directory; inputs is top-level lineage only, never traversed or copied, and pre/post opaque-hash recensus binds root, pinned-file, and excluded-directory identities.

PARENT-TOCTOU-001 closed: pathname-bound O_NOFOLLOW reads reject stat/open replacement and in-flight mutation, while post-hash top-level recensus rejects membership and excluded-directory identity drift.

CONTROL-COMMIT-001 closed: before parent access, refit-free semantic validation must pass and the durable canonical formal-control bytes must be bit-identical to the trusted in-memory control result; validator-valid replacement evidence is rejected.

CUSTODY-001 closed: source-only prediction, fitting-free future isolation, one-row scoring, fail-fast process-group cancellation, and outer cgroup-v2 lifecycle containment are exact, sandboxed, bounded, and independently replayed by focused tests.

BUDGET-CLOSURE-001 closed: the pre-score snapshot and conservative per-file reserves replay below the 2000000000-byte ceiling, child RLIMIT_FSIZE values equal their 1000000-byte reserves, and the final tree and file bounds fail closed.

SCIENTIFIC-CLOSURE-001 closed: protocol, config, 27 reviewed sources, six v2.2 dependencies, MM-007 verifier entry sources, runtime manifests, seeds, score arithmetic, decision precedence, and semantic replay are bound to the audited hashes.

SYNTHETIC-PANEL-001 closed: the complete final-config nonformal MM-009 control panel passed; its refit-free validator accepted evidence SHA-256 598c26a037453f199f07cc5864375689854c7377c376ef41cb85203a824f6476 and canonical-record SHA-256 853cad87235cc3a233d71818a929690a873dddf2e6c5671e6d0cf6754e57b9a3 under the audited protocol and config hashes.

VERIFICATION-001 closed: 130 focused MM-009 tests, Ruff, and mypy passed on the final stable tree; no MM-007 scientific artifact, inputs descendant, or MM-009 canonical outcome was opened during this pre-real audit.
